Short Description:
Algoritz Technologies, also known as Algoritz Web Technologies Private Limited, is a digital marketing agency based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India. Founded in 2011, the company specializes in internet marketing solutions, focusing on enterprise services such as SEO, PPC advertising, online reputation management, search engine marketing, social media marketing, and marketing analytics. With an estimated revenue of $15.7 million, Algoritz positions itself as a one-stop solution for digital marketing needs.

The agency emphasizes creating customized, ROI-driven strategies tailored to meet client requirements. By analyzing client needs, Algoritz delivers effective digital advertising and performance marketing services, helping businesses enhance their online presence and achieve their marketing goals.
